text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across Narita Taishin<n>in the central
plaza.
Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: (Did I do something wrong?)
(Did I do something wrong?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishiiin! Wait up, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Ticket. Dry your tears before<n>you go
chasing after her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-but it's my fault Taishin's—waaah!
choice_data_list: What happened?
What happened?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Taishin's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you're aware, there has<n>been more
talk about the three of us<n>online lately.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the forum that Ticket<n>showed us
had some hate directed at<n>Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was saying so many nice<n>things about
us. I had no idea that<n>other stuff was there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I'm so sorry, Taishiiin!
choice_data_list: No wonder she left without a word to me...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She probably didn't know what to<n>say... There
were hateful comments<n>about you as well.

People were saying how it's your<n>fault for
overworking her and that's<n>why her condition is
so poor.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There was even mention of how<n>Taishin would be
better off with<n>another trainer who can actually
draw<n>out her potential.
choice_data_list: I see...
I see...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry if I'm overstepping, but<n>could you
please talk with Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure what she needs right now<n>are some
words of encouragement<n>from you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: I heard about the comments online.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket and Hayahide told you? Ugh,<n>why are they
literally always sticking<n>their nose in my
business?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'm totally fine. I'm not gonna<n>get stuck in
my own head and do<n>something reckless like
before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So you can just forget about what<n>you heard.
choice_data_list: Those comments hurt me.
Those comments hurt me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: How did you feel when you saw them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hurt.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean, how else am I supposed to<n>feel?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I've already decided that I'm not<n>gonna do
anything crazy just<n>because I'm mad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm itching to do some solo training<n>right now... but
I won't.
choice_data_list: Then how about you get some rest instead?
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
Nah, train as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm itching to do some solo training<n>right now... but
I won't.
choice_data_list: Then how about you get some rest instead?
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
Nah, train as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Making Narita Taishin train when<n>she's feeling
down isn't going to do<n>us any good.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I decide to cancel training for today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What's this?
choice_data_list: Hot chocolate. It'll help you calm down.
Hot chocolate. It'll help you calm down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Thanks, I guess.

Afterward, Narita Taishin and I take<n>some time to
just relax.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Some moderate training should help<n>Narita Taishin
improve.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When I tell her it's probably worse<n>for her health
to bottle up her stress,<n>she agrees.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep myself in check and be<n>careful not to
overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The results of her solo training are<n>good.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to that, she's able to<n>better
understand herself now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Were you even listening to<n>me?
choice_data_list: You'll be fine! You've got me watching over you!
You'll be fine! You've got me watching over you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... If you say so.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Looks like you're feeling better.
Looks like you're feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. There's nothing like a good run<n>to clear the
mind.

Watching Narita Taishin run without<n>worry puts me
in a better mood too.

choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I'm gonna run another lap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I feel better now that I've run a few<n>laps, but I
don't think Trainer does...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Come to think of it, why not blame<n>me for getting
caught in the crossfire?<n>It's my fault those nasty
comments<n>even exist!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, dammit! I can't concentrate at<n>all!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is unable to shed her<n>frustration, and
she remains just as<n>stressed as ever.
